title: rosa rugosa f. rosea
intro: Rosa rugosa f. rosea is a variety of the rugosa rose, a flowering shrub native to East Asia, known for its pink to white flowers and edible hips. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of vitamins A and C, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Rosa rugosa f. rosea have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rosa rugosa f. rosea can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
